whatsNew: Refreshed Home with always-open course progress and one compact XP, rewards, badges and Apprentice+ tools tile.
Added the real KSB gap finder and replaced the large legend with a cleaner progress summary.
Revision, RPL Refresher and EPA knowledge questions now use the course assignment question bank directly.
EPA practice now unlocks only after every KSB is complete.
Removed the duplicate assignment evidence-quality card and added a clear signature-required prompt with a Settings shortcut.
Fixed Dictate targeting and added clearer microphone permission feedback.
Started learning activities now show In progress and in-house training remembers its place.
Unified TA, PA and WT supporting-evidence colours while keeping EPA purple.
Updated the guided demo and Learning revision icon to match the current app.
